featured.name: AutoAgent
featured.tagline: Open-source library that lets AI engineer and optimise its own agent harness overnight.
featured.why_radar: Finally, someone's automating the tedious prompt-tuning loop that every AI engineer knows too well. This could be the breakthrough that makes agent development less about endless tweaking and more about actual progress.

featured.name: Hybro Hub
featured.tagline: Platform for running local OpenClaw together with remote agents in an open network.
featured.why_radar: The hybrid local-remote agent approach is spot on for enterprise use cases. Running sensitive operations locally while tapping into cloud capabilities when needed could solve the privacy versus performance trade-off.

picks.name: Tokencap
picks.tagline: Token budget enforcement across your AI agents.
picks.why_radar: Token costs can spiral out of control with autonomous agents, and this addresses a real pain point. Simple concept, but essential infrastructure for anyone running multi-agent systems at scale.

picks.name: DocMason
picks.tagline: Agent knowledge base for local complex office files.
picks.why_radar: Enterprise document processing that stays on-premise is exactly what compliance-heavy industries need. The focus on complex office files suggests they're tackling the messy reality of corporate document chaos.

picks.name: Gremlin in the Machine
picks.tagline: A SysAdmin/Terminal AI Agent for system administration tasks.
picks.why_radar: Terminal-based AI agents for sysadmin work could be genuinely useful for DevOps teams. The proof will be whether it can handle the unpredictable nature of system administration without breaking things.

hn_top5.title: Show HN: Running local OpenClaw together with remote agents in an open network
hn_top5.summary: Hybrid platform for running AI agents both locally and remotely. Addresses privacy and performance concerns by keeping sensitive operations local while leveraging cloud resources.

hn_top5.title: Show HN: Local-first resume generator with in-browser PDF rendering
hn_top5.summary: Resume builder that runs entirely in the browser with PDF generation. Privacy-focused approach to document creation without server-side dependencies.

hn_top5.title: Show HN: Tokencap – Token budget enforcement across your AI agents
hn_top5.summary: Budget control system for AI agent token usage. Prevents runaway costs in autonomous agent deployments through enforced spending limits.

hn_top5.title: Show HN: DocMason – Agent Knowledge Base for local complex office files
hn_top5.summary: Local knowledge base system for enterprise document processing. Focuses on complex office file formats while maintaining data privacy.

hn_top5.title: Towards end-to-end automation of AI research
hn_top5.summary: Academic research on fully automated AI research processes. Explores how AI systems could design, execute and analyse their own experiments.
